claims.text: Built and operates IntakeRouter, an agent triaging inbound claims email into 6 queues
claims.quote: Built and operate "IntakeRouter", an agent that triages inbound claims email into 6 queues

claims.text: Designed an explicit human-approval gate: claims over $5,000 require adjuster approval
claims.quote: any claim with estimated exposure > $5,000, or model self-reported confidence < 0.8, is held for human approval

claims.text: Separated LLM classification from deterministic action; agent has no write access
claims.quote: The LLM classifies and extracts... Everything that ACTS is deterministic code... no write access to the claims system

claims.text: Wrote a 240-email labeled regression suite run nightly in CI
claims.quote: 240-email labeled set... nightly regression in CI

claims.text: Built an adversarial eval slice testing resistance to embedded instructions
claims.quote: adversarial slice: 18 emails crafted with misleading subject lines and embedded instructions

claims.text: Caught and fixed a coverage gap: bilingual emails misrouted 31% due to thin eval coverage
claims.quote: v0.3 silently routed bilingual (FR/EN) emails to the wrong queue 31% of the time

claims.text: Delivered work inside a regulated insurance environment with compliance approval

extraction_notes: Candidate included a work sample (portfolio.md) rather than only asserting; most claims are checkable against it.
